meta.title: Fear & Greed • Crypto Panel
meta.description: A Binance-style Chrome extension sidepanel that detects the current pair, shows Fear & Greed across timeframes, and calculates a clean Risk score — right where you trade. Works on Binance, OKX, Bybit and TradingView.

home.title: Crypto market sentiment indicator -
home.subtitle: A professional Chrome Extension for crypto traders. Instantly detect the active pair, visualize Fear & Greed across timeframes, and get a clean Risk score directly on your chart.
home.trustLine: Fast, minimal, and built for Binance, OKX and Bybit.
home.videoCaption: Live preview of the extension sidepanel
home.howItWorksSub: Install the extension, get your API key, and paste it into Settings. Quota and plan status update automatically.
home.step1Text: Open Binance, OKX and Bybit and launch the Extension. The pair is detected automatically from the URL.
home.step2Text: Choose a plan on Pricing. After checkout, your key appears in the Dashboard and can be used instantly.
home.step3Text: Go to Settings in the extension, paste the key, and press Check key. Your plan badge and daily quota will show up.

hero.title: Simple plans,
hero.subtitle: The extension is the product UI. The website handles pricing, billing and API key management. Pay with MetaMask and get your key instantly.

checkout.title: Pay with MetaMask
checkout.subtitle: Today: UI + flow. Next step: real smart contract / backend verification.

s1.title: Connect wallet
s1.text: User connects MetaMask. We show network and address.

s2.title: Send payment
s2.text: User pays for PRO/VIP. We show pending/confirmed status.

s3.title: Receive API key
s3.text: After confirmation, Dashboard shows the API key.

demo.title: MetaMask connection (UI)
demo.text: We can add a real MetaMask integration later via wagmi + viem. For now it’s clean layout and buttons.

q1.q: Do I need the website if I have the extension?
q1.a: Yes — the extension is the product UI. The website handles pricing, payments, and key management.

q2.a: Fast crypto checkout without card processing. We can add card payments later.

q3.q: How do I get the API key?
q3.a: After payment, the dashboard shows your key. Then paste it into extension Settings.

q4.q: Can I cancel or change plan?
q4.a: Yes. We’ll implement upgrade/downgrade and show current quota/plan status in the dashboard.

hero.title: How to use
hero.subtitle: Everything you need: install the extension, get an API key, and troubleshoot common issues.

quick.title: Start in 2–3 minutes
quick.subtitle: Recommended: install → get key → paste in Settings.

s1.title: Install extension
s1.text: Install from Chrome Web Store. Open Binance/TradingView and use the sidepanel.

s2.title: Get API key
s2.text2: Your key will be available in

s3.title: Paste key in Settings
s3.text: Open extension Settings → paste key → click Check key. Plan and quota will update automatically.

extension.title: Where do I enter the key?
extension.text: Open sidepanel → Settings → API key → Check key. If valid, you’ll see plan and quota (e.g., PRO • 3/50).

website.title: Where do I get the key?
website.text: On the site, your key appears in

p1.title: I see “—” instead of data
p1.text: Make sure you are on supported pages (Binance/Bybit/OKX). Change symbol and click Refresh. Check internet/VPN.

p2.title: Check key says invalid / unauthorized
p2.text: Paste key without extra spaces. Press Clear → paste again → Check key. If revoked, generate a new key in Dashboard.

p3.title: Limit reached / quota exceeded
p3.text: Daily quota is exhausted. Wait for reset or upgrade your plan on

p4.title: Plan badge shows wrong plan
p4.text: Press Check key to force validation. Refresh and change symbol to update quota.

example.title: What a valid response looks like
example.subtitle: Example only — actual format depends on backend.

s1.title: Is it safe to paste the key?
s1.text: Yes. The key is for API access and quota only. Don’t share it with third-party sites. Revoke and generate a new key if needed.

s2.title: What data do we store?
s2.text: Minimal: Install ID for anti-fraud + your API key stored in browser sync storage. We don’t store exchange data.

cta.title: Ready to upgrade?
cta.subtitle: Go PRO/VIP, pay via MetaMask, and get your key for the extension.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy & Terms of Use
privacy.overviewText1: This page describes the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use for the SentiPulse service.
privacy.overviewText2: SentiPulse provides a crypto sentiment indicator, a Chrome extension and an API used to deliver Fear & Greed analytics inside supported trading platforms.
privacy.apiKeyText: Users receive an API key after subscribing to a plan. The API key is used to authenticate requests, determine quota limits and identify the subscription plan. The API key is stored locally in the user's browser.
privacy.installIdText: The extension may generate a random installation identifier used for anti-abuse protection, quota management and system stability. This identifier does not contain personal information.
privacy.websiteDataText: When visiting the website, basic technical information may be collected, such as browser type, device type and visited pages. This information is used only to improve the service.
privacy.thirdPartyText: The extension may operate on third-party platforms including Binance, Bybit, OKX and TradingView. SentiPulse is not affiliated with these services. Each platform has its own terms and privacy policies.
privacy.disclaimerText1: SentiPulse provides sentiment indicators for informational purposes only.
privacy.disclaimerText2: Nothing on this website or within the extension constitutes financial advice, investment advice or trading recommendations. Users are solely responsible for their trading decisions.
privacy.terms1: Certain features require a subscription plan.
privacy.terms2: Plans may include usage limits or quotas.
privacy.terms3: Users must not share API keys publicly or attempt to bypass quota limits.
privacy.terms4: Violation of these rules may result in suspension of the API key.
privacy.securityText: We implement reasonable measures to protect our systems. However, no internet service can guarantee absolute security. Users are responsible for keeping their API key private.
privacy.liabilityText: SentiPulse shall not be held liable for trading losses, financial damages, service interruptions or data inaccuracies. The service is provided "as is" without guarantees.
privacy.changesText: We may update this document when necessary. Updated versions will be published on this page. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
privacy.contactText: If you have questions regarding this policy, please contact:

support.title: Support
support.subtitle: If you need help with the SentiPulse extension, please contact us or check the documentation.
support.faq1: The extension does not show data — make sure you are on a supported exchange page.
support.faq2: API key invalid — paste the key again and press Check key.
support.faq3: Quota exceeded — wait for the daily reset or upgrade your plan.
support.faq4: Extension panel not opening — reload the page and click the extension icon.

about.title: About SentiPulse
about.intro: SentiPulse is a crypto sentiment indicator designed for traders who want to quickly understand market mood directly on their charts.
about.whatText: The SentiPulse extension detects the active trading pair and displays a Fear & Greed sentiment indicator together with a simplified risk score. The goal is to provide a clear visual signal of market sentiment without interrupting the trading workflow.
about.disclaimerText: SentiPulse provides market sentiment indicators for informational purposes only. The service does not provide financial advice, trading recommendations or investment guidance. Users are responsible for their own trading decisions.

meta.title: SentiPulse Extension — Multi-Timeframe Crypto Fear & Greed
meta.description: Track crypto fear and greed across multiple timeframes with a clean Chrome extension built for fast market sentiment checks.

hero.title: Track Crypto Fear & Greed Across Multiple Timeframes
hero.subtitle: Spot sentiment shifts faster with clean multi-timeframe signals for BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP and more.
hero.trustLine: No noise. No chart overload. Just fast sentiment clarity.

pain.title: Stop Guessing the Market Mood
pain.subtitle: Crypto moves fast, but reading sentiment clearly usually does not.

items.title: Too much noise
items.text: Charts, news, Twitter and indicators often point in different directions.

items.title: No quick read
items.text: It takes too long to understand whether sentiment looks strong, weak or stretched.

items.title: Missing timeframe context
items.text: A pair can look constructive on one timeframe and fragile on another.

pain.bottomLine: SentiPulse helps you read crypto market mood in seconds, not after 20 tabs and 10 charts.

items.title: Multi-Timeframe Signals
items.text: See sentiment structure across short-term and higher timeframes in one view.

items.title: Fear & Greed Readings
items.text: Quickly understand whether a pair looks fearful, neutral, constructive or overheated.

items.title: Fast Pair Comparison
items.text: Compare BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP and more without digging through chart clutter.

items.title: Cleaner Market Context
items.text: Get a faster read on whether conditions look stable, mixed, stretched or risky.

howItWorks.title: Start in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: Open the extension, check the signals and scan the market faster.

steps.title: Open the extension
steps.text: Launch SentiPulse directly from your Chrome toolbar.

steps.title: Check the sentiment
steps.text: See fear and greed style signals across multiple timeframes.

steps.title: Scan faster
steps.text: Compare pairs and identify where sentiment looks stronger or more stretched.

comparison.title: More useful than a single market index
comparison.bottomLine: Instead of one generic market reading, SentiPulse helps you understand where sentiment actually looks stronger and where it does not.

items.a: SentiPulse is a Chrome extension for quick crypto market sentiment checks across multiple timeframes.
It is built for BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP and broader crypto market workflows.
No. It is a sentiment and market context tool, not an automated trading system.
Because market structure can look different across timeframes, and alignment matters.

cta.title: See crypto sentiment in seconds
cta.subtitle: Install SentiPulse and get a cleaner multi-timeframe view of crypto market mood.
cta.note: Built for fast BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP and broader market sentiment checks.
